column1: # Phase 2 source-word exclusion list. One word per line: word, reason.
# A crown candidate listed here cannot headline a day (it stays a
# valid, scorable find). reason is pure-inflection, degree-form, or
# past-tense-dual. Hand-editable: strike a line to re-admit a word
# (for example re-add stranger), or add a line to exclude one.
# Derived from Wiktionary form_of tags over the pre-cull crown pool.
# Future-growth caveat: if the source pool is widened (for example
# SCOWL band 35), re-run the derivation to extend this list.
